data.title: Add Security Boundary, Architectural Integrity, and Internal Pattern Compliance categories to ACCEPTANCE-CRITERIA-LIBRARY.md
data.description: Append three new project-agnostic category blocks to plugins/dso/docs/ACCEPTANCE-CRITERIA-LIBRARY.md: ## Category: Security Boundary, ## Category: Architectural Integrity, ## Category: Internal Pattern Compliance. Each includes ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md precedence note and Verify: command templates. Testing: structural boundary checks per Rule 5 (section heading grep commands ARE the RED tests). TDD Unit Exemption criterion 3. testing_mode: GREEN.
